nasb.text: Soon afterwards He went to a city called Nain; and His disciples were going along with Him, accompanied by a large crowd.

esv.text: Soon afterward he went to a town called Nain, and his disciples and a great crowd went with him.

cnv.text: 後來耶穌往拿因城去，與他同去的有門徒和一大群人。

ccb.text: 过了不久，耶稣去拿因城，随行的有门徒和一大群人。

csbs.text: 第二天，耶稣往一个叫做拿因的城去，他的门徒们和一大群人也与他同行。
